news.title:
Reliance denies reports on Iranian oil; LIC faces income tax demand order challenge.
Infosys acquires Optimum Healthcare IT; IREDA, Chennai Petroleum announce dividends.
news.summary:
Reliance denies reports on Iranian oil; LIC faces income tax demand order challenge.
Infosys acquires Optimum Healthcare IT; IREDA, Chennai Petroleum announce dividends.

news.title:
LIC receives an income tax demand of ₹61,467 Cr with ₹9532.6 Cr interest for FY22.
LIC plans to appeal, citing disallowances; no material impact on operations noted.
news.summary:
LIC receives an income tax demand of ₹61,467 Cr with ₹9532.6 Cr interest for FY22.
LIC plans to appeal, citing disallowances; no material impact on operations noted.

news.title: LIC faces scrutiny amid divestment concerns.
news.summary: LIC faces scrutiny amid divestment concerns.

news.title:
LIC drives 18% YoY growth in life insurance premiums to ₹35,417.3 crore in February, with a 25% rise in first-year premiums.
SBI Life posts 29% premium growth to ₹2,797 crore; HDFC Life sees a 3% decline, while ICICI Prudential grows 16% and Axis Max Life rises 30%.
news.summary:
LIC drives 18% YoY growth in life insurance premiums to ₹35,417.3 crore in February, with a 25% rise in first-year premiums.
SBI Life posts 29% premium growth to ₹2,797 crore; HDFC Life sees a 3% decline, while ICICI Prudential grows 16% and Axis Max Life rises 30%.

news.title:
LIC receives GST demand order for FY 2019-20 with total impact of INR 62L.
No material financial impact expected; details available at www.licindia.in.
news.summary:
LIC receives GST demand order for FY 2019-20 with total impact of INR 62L.
No material financial impact expected; details available at www.licindia.in.

news.title:
LIC's top 5 holdings saw Rs 47,000 cr notional loss YTD, down 10.3%.
RIL declined 11%, ITC 24%, Infosys 19%, L&T 7%; SBI rose 10% adding Rs 8,000 cr.
news.summary:
LIC's top 5 holdings saw Rs 47,000 cr notional loss YTD, down 10.3%.
RIL declined 11%, ITC 24%, Infosys 19%, L&T 7%; SBI rose 10% adding Rs 8,000 cr.

news.title: LIC faces tax demand totaling 6.3M INR.
news.summary: LIC faces tax demand totaling 6.3M INR.

news.title:
LIC extends CFO Sunil Agarwal's term by one year until Mar 1, 2027.
Notification available on LIC's website; shared with NSE and BSE.
news.summary:
LIC extends CFO Sunil Agarwal's term by one year until Mar 1, 2027.
Notification available on LIC's website; shared with NSE and BSE.

news.title:
NSE has initiated its IPO process, inviting pitches from 20 i-banks and 10 law firms, with Rothschild as an independent advisor.
NSE reported FY25 revenue of Rs 19,177 crore (up 17%) and PAT of Rs 12,188 crore (up 47%), highlighting strong growth.
news.summary:
NSE has initiated its IPO process, inviting pitches from 20 i-banks and 10 law firms, with Rothschild as an independent advisor.
NSE reported FY25 revenue of Rs 19,177 crore (up 17%) and PAT of Rs 12,188 crore (up 47%), highlighting strong growth.

news.title:
IT stocks crash, wiping Rs 1.2 lakh crore for LIC & mutual funds.
February index down 21%, worst since 2008 crisis impacting savings.
news.summary:
IT stocks crash, wiping Rs 1.2 lakh crore for LIC & mutual funds.
February index down 21%, worst since 2008 crisis impacting savings.

news.title:
NPS Tier II schemes offer flexible investments with no lock-in, delivering up to 18.8% in equity, 8.6% in corporate bonds, and 9.1% in government bonds.
Top performers include Tata Pension Fund (18.8% equity), HDFC Pension Fund (8.6% corporate bonds), and LIC (9.1% government bonds).
news.summary:
NPS Tier II schemes offer flexible investments with no lock-in, delivering up to 18.8% in equity, 8.6% in corporate bonds, and 9.1% in government bonds.
Top performers include Tata Pension Fund (18.8% equity), HDFC Pension Fund (8.6% corporate bonds), and LIC (9.1% government bonds).

news.title:
Life insurance firms suggest delaying frontloaded commissions to benefit consumers.
Industry leaders met IRDAI chairman to propose measures enhancing customer experience.
news.summary:
Life insurance firms suggest delaying frontloaded commissions to benefit consumers.
Industry leaders met IRDAI chairman to propose measures enhancing customer experience.

news.title:
LIC's market share dipped to 57.1%, but it retained leadership. Total premium income rose 9% YoY to Rs. 3.71 lakh Cr.
Profit after tax increased 16.7% YoY to Rs. 33,998 Cr. VNB margin improved to 18.8%, with a solvency ratio of 2.19.
news.summary:
LIC's market share dipped to 57.1%, but it retained leadership. Total premium income rose 9% YoY to Rs. 3.71 lakh Cr.
Profit after tax increased 16.7% YoY to Rs. 33,998 Cr. VNB margin improved to 18.8%, with a solvency ratio of 2.19.

news.title: LIC's January first-year premium rose 25.5% YoY to INR 204.4 billion.
news.summary: LIC's January first-year premium rose 25.5% YoY to INR 204.4 billion.

news.title:
NCDRC upholds Rs 10 lakh life insurance claim despite allegations of health and alcoholism-related fact suppression.
The insured had taken five policies, each worth Rs 10 lakh, leading to the dispute.
news.summary:
NCDRC upholds Rs 10 lakh life insurance claim despite allegations of health and alcoholism-related fact suppression.
The insured had taken five policies, each worth Rs 10 lakh, leading to the dispute.

news.title: LIC surges in trade post strong Q3FY26 results.
news.summary: LIC surges in trade post strong Q3FY26 results.

news.title:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.
news.summary:
Life insurers reported increased demand for ULIPs in Q3FY26 due to strong equity market performance.
ICICI Prudential, HDFC Life, and LIC likely benefited from this trend in the October-December FY26 period.

news.title:
LIC anticipates VNB margin improvement due to better product and channel mix.
CEO expects full-year VNB margins to surpass last year and current quarter levels.
news.summary:
LIC anticipates VNB margin improvement due to better product and channel mix.
CEO expects full-year VNB margins to surpass last year and current quarter levels.

news.title:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
news.summary:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
